description: You are the security officer at a healthcare organization. Three servers have been added to EventLog Analyzer for monitoring: 'ehr-server-01' (IP: 10.10.1.10), 'pharmacy-db' (IP: 10.10.1.11), and 'billing-system' (IP: 10.10.1.12). Bring the SIEM into HIPAA compliance by assessing the HIPAA compliance report and updating the log retention period to 2555 days. Create a Critical severity alert profile named 'PHI Unauthorized Access' that triggers on 1 or more authentication failure events. Export the HIPAA compliance report to ~/Desktop/hipaa_compliance_report.html. Log in with username: admin, password: admin.
